certificate.caveat: When operated in approved mode and installed, initialized and configured as specified in section 11 of the Security Policy.
certificate.description: Network Security Services (NSS) is a set of C libraries designed to support cross-platform development of security-enabled applications. NSS implements major Internet security standards.
